label: Code Condition
description: Runs authored code that returns true or false.
comment: [VSR] Advanced raw Luau condition emitted inside a protected call.
debugHints: The code can use triggerObject, triggerContext, VRS, resolveTarget, and makeVector3.
Return true to follow the TRUE branch; any other result follows the FALSE branch.

parameters.label: Script Code
parameters.description: Runs as a boolean check and must return true or false.

beginnerSummary: Run authored script code as a true or false check.
